subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Andrew and Caroline would love to come see the island! I've cced him to work out the details....

Happy New Year!

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body: glad it worked out. if you husband woudl like to see the island this week i will arrange it.

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Mr. Epstein:

Many, many thanks for your overwhelming generosity. ██████ and I flew home today with Mr. Farkas and his family. They took very good care of us and they couldn't have been nicer. Andrew and ██████ are still stuck in St. Thomas, enjoying the use of your car.

We are extremely grateful for everything you have done for us.

Happy New Year and hope to see you next time you are at Harvard.

Fondly,
Kelly Friendly
body_html:

We are extremely grateful for everything you have done for us.

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Ann brought us the car. It's wonderful, thank you so much.

We are so grateful for your generosity...

Kelly Friendly
█████████████

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body: you will get a call from either jermain, or cecile ( the governors wife and my asst )

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body: jermaine, please organzie kelly to have use of the mini van. today

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body: ██████ andrew farkas is flying tomorrow. please contact him directly and as soon as you are ready i will organize the use of my car.
body_html: ██████ andrew farkas is flying tomorrow. please contact him directly and as soon as you are ready i will organize the use of my car.

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body: my friend andrew farkas has a pretty full plane to ny tomorrwo but can take 1 or 2 of you. i can call other hotels wher we have pull.. my cars and drivers are at your disposal.
body_html: my friend andrew farkas has a pretty full plane to ny tomorrwo but can take 1 or 2 of you. i can call other hotels wher we have pull.. my cars and drivers are at your disposal.

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Thank you! We are so grateful....

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Excellent. I will email him now.

If it's not too much of an inconvenience we would love to use the car. Is it available around 3? We are staying by the airport....

Kelly Friendly
█████████████

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Fantastic. If possible, could my daughter █████ (age 11) and I go back with Mr. Farkas?

Please let me know how best to follow up. We may have found a condo by red hook but haven't found a car yet.

Let me know how to follow up.
Kelly Friendly
█████████████

subject: Re: Larry Summers
body:
Mr. Epstein:

I work for Larry Summers and as you may have heard, we are stranded in St. Thomas and the airlines are saying we can't get out until Thursday.

Our names:

Kelly Friendly
Andrew Friendly
██████████████

My cell is below or you can reach my husband Andrew Friendly on his cell at █████████████. You may have met him when he was President Clinton's aide.

We would be so grateful for any help you could provide.

Kelly Friendly
████████████████████
